query: SELECT id, spotGroup, heroPosition, villainPosition, stackDepth FROM rangeCharts WHERE stackDepth = 40 AND (spotGroup = 'VS_UTG_RFI' OR spotGroup = 'VS_MP_RFI') AND heroPosition IN ('HJ', 'CO') LIMIT 10;
